user.title: Navimow (Private) login
user.description: Enter the email and password of the Segway/Navimow account that owns (or was shared) the mower. Tip: use a dedicated account that the mower is shared with, so your primary phone session is not disturbed.

select_vehicle.title: Choose a mower
select_vehicle.description: More than one mower was found on this account.

manual.title: Enter your mower's serial
manual.description: No mower is listed on this account (this is normal for a shared account). Enter the mower serial number (found in the Navimow app under device info, e.g. S4THAxxxxxxxxxx). It will be validated with a live read.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Navimow
reauth_confirm.description: The stored session expired. Enter the account password again.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Navimow cloud. Try again.
error.no_vehicles: No mower is associated with this account.
error.vehicle_not_found: That serial could not be read on this account. Check the serial and that the mower is shared with this account.

init.title: Navimow options
init.description: Zone list for the zone selector, as a comma-separated list of id:name pairs (for example: 1:Zone 1,5:Zone 2). The region id is the map partition id. Leave blank to rely on auto-discovery.
